item.title: Vogel der Woche - der Wendehals (Serie 204: Vogel der Woche)
item.description: Von innerer und äußerer Beweglichkeit des Kopfes ...---... more birds: https://dgqyks.podcaster.de/vogel-der-woche.rss Pic cc 2.0 by Martien Feed: https://www.freie-radios.net/portal/podcast.php?rss

item.title: Andrew W. M. Smith, "Make Cheese Not War: Transnational Resistance and the Larzac in Modern France" (Manchester UP, 2026)
item.description: In 1971, the French government announced a massive extension of its military base on the Larzac plateau in southern France. Land was to be expropriated from 107 farms around the small town of La Cavalerie. Limited resistance was expected, but what happened next exceeded all expectations. Local sheep farmers set up protest camps and occupied the land. They soon attracted an astonishing level of support, pioneering a form of regional radicalism with global implications... Feed: https://feeds.megaphone.fm/LIT4543917034
